pi_items.source: Standard iDempiere GardenWorld demo database (confirmed via setup_task.sh line 20 SQL query); verified with web search results confirming Azalea Bush is a product in GardenWorld demo data
Task description explicitly states: 'Movement Quantity: 5' (line 16); verified against setup_task.sh which seeds 20 units to ensure sufficient inventory for this 5-unit movement

Standard iDempiere GardenWorld demo database warehouse (confirmed via setup_task.sh line 12 SQL query); verified with web search results confirming HQ Warehouse exists in GardenWorld as central warehouse
Task description line 4 explicitly requires: 'Set the Description to: "Rebalance stock - Azalea Bush transfer"' which contains 'Azalea Bush'; verifier.py line 100 checks for 'azalea' in description

iDempiere standard document status code where 'CO' = 'Completed' (confirmed via web search on iDempiere documentation; DocStatus.txt and Document Status documentation); task description line 8 requires completing the document

privileged_info_summary: The create_inventory_move task operates on real iDempiere GardenWorld demo data. The product 'Azalea Bush' and warehouse 'HQ Warehouse' are standard entities in the GardenWorld client that comes with iDempiere. The task requires creating an Inventory Move document transferring 5 units of Azalea Bush between two locators within HQ Warehouse, with a description containing 'Azalea Bush', and completing the document to achieve docstatus 'CO' (Completed). All metadata claims accurately reflect the iDempiere entity names and task requirements. Stock quantities are seeded dynamically by setup_task.sh if insufficient, ensuring prerequisites are met.
